choices.text: Regional ($60-100k) → National ($100-200k) → Major ($150-400k+ senior captain). 5-15 years to major. ATP required (1,500 hrs). Mandatory retirement 65. Major shortage globally; demand high.

Pilot: $80-120k training cost; $80-100k starting (regional); ~5-7 yrs to recover investment + start excellent salary. Alternative: A&P mechanic ($50-100k, 18 months training); ATC ($40-180k, federal); aerospace engineer ($90-200k); drone Part 107 ($200 cert).
